title: Harnessing male germline epigenomics for the genetic improvement in cattle.
author: Wang X Li W Feng X Li J Liu GE Fang L Yu Y
content: S-EPMC10242889 PMC10242889 Harnessing male germline epigenomics for the genetic improvement in cattle. Sperm is essential for successful artificial insemination in dairy cattle, and its quality can be influenced by both epigenetic modification and epigenetic inheritance. The bovine germline
